ai_summary: Elon Musk announced that Tesla's Cybercab has begun production, marking a major milestone in the company's autonomous vehicle development. This represents significant progress in Tesla's strategy to scale its self-driving taxi service, demonstrating the transition from prototype to manufacturing phase—a critical validation of the technical and business viability of the Cybercab product line.
embed_html:
Cybercab has started production pic.twitter.com/MAeswanf96

text:
@yunta_tsai Tesla AI is where the rubber hits the road. “Make no mistakes” is not just a meme joke for self-driving AI. 

Tesla AI saves lives every day, at large scale. No other AI team can yet make that claim.
summary: @yunta_tsai Tesla AI is where the rubber hits the road. “Make no mistakes” is not just a meme joke for self-driving AI. Tesla AI saves lives every day, at large scale. No other AI team can yet make that claim.

parent.text: A lot of AI engineers have spent their most productive years chasing benchmarks instead of solving useful cases they can relate to. If the car fails to take me home, then I simply fail at my job and can’t go home. That’s it.
parent.name: Yun-Ta Tsai
parent.embed_html:
A lot of AI engineers have spent their most productive years chasing benchmarks instead of solving useful cases they can relate to.

If the car fails to take me home, then I simply fail at my job and can’t go home. That’s it.

— Yun-Ta Tsai (@yunta_tsai) April 24, 2026

ai_summary: The thread contrasts AI development approaches: chasing benchmark improvements versus solving real-world problems with tangible consequences. Elon argues that Tesla's autonomous driving AI exemplifies the latter—where failure has immediate, serious consequences (unable to get home safely), creating genuine accountability that drives superior engineering compared to academic benchmark-chasing. This highlights Tesla's competitive advantage in AI through real-world validation at scale where safety failures have direct human impact.
embed_html:
Tesla AI is where the rubber hits the road. “Make no mistakes” is not just a meme joke for self-driving AI.

Tesla AI saves lives every day, at large scale. No other AI team can yet make that claim.

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) April 24, 2026
